body_txt: A form of replication in which a container holds a smaller version of itself. Sometimes, the smallest container holds a surprise for the person who goes through the trouble of opening all those layers. In Russia , Matryoshka Dolls are commonly used to symbolize motherhood and fertility. In fiction, these types of objects can also serve as a visual motif for a character's nested identities or society's hierarchies. Super-Trope to Nested Mouths and Recursive Ammo . See also Droste Image and Mini-Me . Compare to Nested Story and Recursive Reality .
